title: Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Kochi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates:
Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates!
